problem: Coronary artery disease (CAD) is the leading cause of death globally. Conventional diagnostic methods like stress tests have high false positive (55%) and false negative (20-30%) rates, leading to undiagnosed disease, unnecessary invasive procedures, incorrect treatment plans, poor patient experience, and increased healthcare costs.
solution: HeartFlow One is an AI-powered platform that transforms coronary CTA (CCTA) scans into personalized 3D models of the heart, assessing both anatomy and physiology. The platform includes Roadmap Analysis for CAD detection, FFRCT Analysis for blood flow assessment to determine revascularization benefit, and Plaque Analysis for disease management. This non-invasive approach provides cardiologists with detailed insights to personalize treatment pathways.
